data.body: C1 implemented on branch giverm/OSCER-736-application-form-abstract-base. New CertificationCaseApplicationForm abstract base holds shared lifecycle; FormApprovalStatus grows lazy review_task_class; 3 leaves reparented (-152 lines dup). Two fresh-eyes reviews (Opus+Fable) folded in: class_attribute bindings, event_payload super-preservation test, staff_exemption_review_complete? pin, find_by_certification_case_id deleted (dead code), exemption gains unconditional certification_case_id presence (parity). Verified: new+3 regression specs green (117 ex), full suite 2456 ex 0 failures, 96.26/82.82 coverage, RuboCop clean. NOT committed/pushed. Pre-merge TODO: audit exemption_application_forms WHERE certification_case_id IS NULL.
